# zstack_ssh_key_pairs (Data Source)

Query ZStack SSH Key Pairs by name, name pattern, or additional filters.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filter` (Block List) Filter results by field values. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--filter))
- `name` (String) Exact name for querying an SSH key pair.
- `name_pattern` (String) Pattern for fuzzy matching SSH key pair names. Use % or _ like SQL.

### Read-Only

- `ssh_key_pairs` (Attributes List) List of matched SSH key pairs. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ssh_key_pairs))

<a id="nestedblock--filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filter`

Required:

- `name` (String) Name of the field to filter by.
- `values` (Set of String) List of values to match. Treated as OR conditions.


<a id="nestedatt--ssh_key_pairs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ssh_key_pairs`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Description of the SSH key pair.
- `name` (String) Name of the SSH key pair.
- `public_key` (String) The SSH public key content.
- `uuid` (String) UUID of the SSH key pair.
